Definitely feels like you're never entirely 'off duty' — risk assessments become second nature. And good luck not thinking in goals after dealing with planning daily!
Felt that shift too! Beyond just work & relationships, suddenly there's all these wellness goals - gotta stay fit but also chill enough not to stress eat? It's like juggling on a tightrope sometimes!

Sure we've come forward, but there are still old-school expectations around careers where some think twice before stepping outside those lines – speaking from observing many across diverse environments!
